creator: k@free.de
text:
Just for the sake of cleaning up, I propose this 2y old PR to be closed and that the holder/reporter reopens a new PR, _if_ the problem still persists on FBSD 9.3.

Also this PR is mainly a duplicate of open PR 178482 ("logging problem from vnet jail") if I understand the problem description of PR 178480 correctly.

I can report that as for FBSD 10.1 there are no filtering problems when using a dynamically loaded ipfw for firewalling on the jail host and inside VIMAGE jails. Only ipfw logging inside VIMAGE jails does not work.

Regards,
K.
